ip: IP / FQDN of Tesla Wall Connector Gen 3
ip_help: Here you enter the IP or FQDN of your Tesla Wall Connector Gen 3
interval_help: Here you enter the polling interval in seconds. The adapter will poll the Tesla Wall Connector Gen 3 at this interval. Default = 10 seconds. Minimum = 1 second. Maximum = 3600 seconds.
pollingTimeout_help: Here you define the request timeout when polling from Tesla Wall Connector Gen 3 [min 1000, max 100000]. Default = 5000.
retries_help: Here you enter how often you want the adapter to retry polling in case of error [min 0, max 999]. 0 = never, 999 = unlimited. Default = 10.
retrymultiplier_help: Here you enter how you want to space retries apart of each other. n'th retry will happen after Interval * Multiplier * n seconds. [min 1, max 10]. Default = 2.
